title: Context Window Management
subtitle: Context Window Management
description: LLM context windows are finite, and in long-running tasks, preserving critical information while trimming redundant content and avoiding token overflow is essential. This is not an optimization problem—it's a survival problem.
sub_problems: Token estimation: Accurately estimate token count of the current prompt before calling the LLM
Overflow trimming: Trim content by priority (old messages, tool results, search materials)
Summary compression: Compress long conversation history into summaries while retaining key information
Sliding window: Retain only the last N conversation turns or last N tool results
Budget allocation: Allocate token budgets across different content types
Tool output compression: Compress large raw tool outputs into structured summaries while preserving core knowledge
Prompt template management: Systematically manage system prompts via external configuration files with multi-language support
best_practices: Estimation is mandatory: Regardless of approach, always know current token usage before calling the LLM
Reserve safety margin: MiroThinker's 85% strategy is worth emulating—reserve 15-20% space for output
Tiered trimming beats one-size-fits-all: Tool results > old conversations > system prompts, prioritized by importance
Validate format after compression: Fixing dangling tool calls is easily overlooked but critical
Account for multi-provider differences: Different LLMs have different tokenizers requiring adaptation
Truncate at source rather than downstream: Limit size when creating data structures to prevent large data from entering the pipeline
Multi-level fallback ensures availability: API > tiktoken > litellm > estimation guarantees token tracking in any environment
Preserve original data references after compression: ToolTrace stores both summary and truncated raw_answer for traceability

values.DeepTutor: Four-level fallback: API response > tiktoken > litellm > word_count×1.3
values.PageIndex: tiktoken per-model encoding precise token calculation per page

values.DeerFlow: LLM summarization replaces old messages + dangling tool call repair
values.DeepResearch: AgentFold step-level merging + ReSum full replacement
values.DeepTutor: NoteAgent LLM summarization + ToolTrace 50KB source truncation
values.PageIndex: Tree node merging + token threshold pruning

values.DeerFlow: Three triggers with OR logic (any satisfied)
values.DeepTutor: Auto-trigger NoteAgent compression after each tool call
values.PageIndex: Auto-split when grouped token total exceeds LLM limit

values.DeerFlow: Summarization failure reverts to keeping last 15 messages
values.DeepResearch: Independent ReSum model server without occupying main model window
values.DeepTutor: Dual-layer exceptions LLMContextError + ProviderContextWindowError + auto message mapping
values.PageIndex: Three-level fallback + validate_and_truncate index bounds protection

values.DeepTutor: Per tool call granularity, each call independently compressed into one ToolTrace
values.PageIndex: Page-level grouping with overlap_page ensuring semantic coherence

values.DeepTutor: YAML multi-language prompts + singleton caching + zh→cn→en fallback chain

values.PageIndex: Bottom-up merging with recursive splitting for token-exceeded nodes

solutions.title: _estimate_tokens() tiktoken estimation + ensure_summary_context() auto-fallback
solutions.description: openai_client.py:363-382 _estimate_tokens() uses tiktoken o200k_base encoder for precise token estimation (fallback cl100k_base → len//4). openai_client.py:384-444 ensure_summary_context() checks before final answer generation whether prompt_tokens + completion_tokens + summary_tokens + max_tokens + 1000 buffer exceeds limit; if exceeded, removes last assistant-user conversation pair. Safety coefficient 1.5x.

solutions.title: DanglingToolCallMiddleware + SummarizationMiddleware dual middleware fault-tolerant compression
solutions.description: DanglingToolCallMiddleware scans AIMessage.tool_calls in before_model hook, injecting status="error" placeholder messages for dangling calls lacking ToolMessage responses. SummarizationMiddleware supports three trigger conditions (tokens threshold/message count/fraction usage), triggering LLM-generated summaries replacing old messages while retaining last N messages. AI/Tool message pair protection prevents splitting. Summarization failure reverts to keeping last 15 messages.

solutions.title: AgentFold <compress> tag + ReSum 90% threshold full-replacement summarization
solutions.description: AgentFold/infer.py:78 enables LLM to proactively generate <compress> tags declaring foldable history steps. update_and_sort_steps() (infer.py:170-198) maintains step_list data structure, merging consecutive steps into [Compressed Step X to Y]. ReSum (WebResummer/src/react_agent.py:135) calls independent summarization model for full message replacement when token usage reaches 90%. Uses two prompts: QUERY_SUMMARY_PROMPT (initial) and QUERY_SUMMARY_PROMPT_LAST (incremental).

solutions.title: trim_context_to_word_limit() 25000 word ceiling + visited_urls cross-layer deduplication
solutions.description: gpt_researcher/skills/deep_research.py DeepResearchSkill trims merged learnings + context + citations to 25000 words after tree-structured recursive search (breadth=4, depth=2) completes. Cross-layer shared visited_urls set implements URL-level deduplication preventing duplicate fetches. Concurrency controlled via asyncio.Semaphore(2) limiting simultaneous queries.

solutions.title: NoteAgent information compression and multi-layer token tracking
solutions.description: LLM-driven information compression rather than simple truncation preserves semantic integrity, representing an advanced context management strategy.

solutions.title: Token budget document splitting strategy
solutions.description: LLM context windows have hard token limits. When processing ultra-long documents (hundreds-page PDFs, large Markdown files), strategic splitting becomes essential.
